calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-09-2004 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Sep-13-2004 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Sep-13-2004 Case Settled - Set For Crc 525 Hearing On Nov-16-04 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: This Cause came as reassignment from the Presiding Judge Department for Settlement on the record.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Teena Paxton.
Daniel Crawford, Esq. for Plaintiff: A.R. Sanchez-Corea and Associates, Inc.
John Kao, Esq. for Defendant: Richard Wong.
10:40 a.m.- Parties and counsels present and reached a settlement. Terms were read into the record as follows: Defendant has written and turn over a check to the Plaintiff, for the settlement amount of $10,500.00 posted dated for Sept. 23, 2004.
Plaintiff will negociate the check on the posted date and to dismissed with prejudice.
The settlment represents all claims.
Parties agreed to terms in open court. Matter is placed on CRC-225 calendar for Nov. 16, 2004 in Dept. 212 at 10:00 a.m. for DISMISSAL.
The Court deemed matter settled and trial date is vacated.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar May-28-2004 Set For Trial On Sep-13-04 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-13-2004 Set For Trial On Aug-16-04 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206
